title: Surface running agents near the chat composer
description: Move the active-agent signal from the compact sister picker into a full-width composer-adjacent tray so users can see which agents are running and tap directly into Agent View on mobile.

title: Increase mobile tap targets for secondary workspace controls
description: Raise small buttons, pills, and toggles to mobile-friendly heights while preserving compact desktop sizing with responsive classes.

title: Add CSS or DOM smoke coverage for composer mobile controls
description: Create a focused test that asserts chat composer controls expose touch-friendly class names and the running-agent tray renders when active agents exist.

title: Normalize visual-smoke artifacts into an ignored report directory
description: Move the existing viewport screenshot helper and PNG outputs out of the workspace root into an ignored auto-improvement report path.
